observation: AddItem mutation returns HTTP 200 but with backend validation errors; item NOT added to cart

validationErrors.errorMessage: All line items unselected. Please select at least one line item.
Configuration section CustomText exceeds the maximum allowed length of 5 characters

reason: PR #2268 removed client-side validation but the server still enforces maxLength=5 for text sections, rejecting TEST_QA (7 chars). The Add-to-cart button is now enabled and the UI reports no error, but the cart silently does not receive the item. User sees nothing, experiences a silent failure. This is worse than the original bug because at least the original error told the user what was wrong.
